narrative_role: Ponte narrativo. La bussola arancione diventa il logo di Conflavoro AI.

prompt_components.subject: the orange-glowing compass in foreground, isolated on a clean cream-white background
prompt_components.action: the compass remains prominent and glowing in the foreground; behind it, the world dissolves gradually from the ship/ocean environment to a stylized isometric illustration of a modern Italian office or meeting room, all rendered in the same painterly cartoon style as the story but with subtle modern details (laptops as abstract shapes, modern furniture in line-art); the compass at the center could be interpreted as a glowing logo mark
prompt_components.environment: begins ship-like, ends clean modern stylized office; transition via gradient and soft dissolve
prompt_components.lighting: the compass remains the dominant light source throughout, the background lighting shifts from warm afternoon to clean modern soft daylight
prompt_components.mood: bridge between past and present, the metaphor becoming the brand
prompt_components.audio_hint: the warm resonance fades, replaced by a subtle modern ambient pad, like the gentle hum of a high-end studio — neutral and inviting

_critical_note: Scena difficile per Veo. Se non viene bene: alternativa = generare statica con Imagen 3 + animare il dissolve in reveal.js con CSS transition.
acceptance_criteria: Bussola arancione resta nitida in foreground per tutto il clip
Background si trasforma in modo riconoscibile
Stile coerente: stesso painterly cartoon dello story
Audio: transizione sonora chiara da mythic a modern
